description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


- New: Added value color scheme for Asia (Red Up / Green Down), configurable in the preferences.
- New: Added a collapsible Statement of Assets page.
- New: Added an ex-date field for dividends and other security-related account transactions.
- New: Added PDF importers for Liberty Vorsorge AG, Freiburger Kantonalbank, and neon Switzerland AG.
- Improvement: Enhanced PDF importers for Scalable Capital, Revolut, PostFinance, Raiffeisenbank, flatex, Questrade, Deutsche Bank, Postbank, Baader Bank, Degiro, Onvista, Renault Bank, JTDirektbank, and Bank11.
- Improvement: Allow opening bookmarks for multiple securities in the Security Performance view.
- Improvement: Improved UI responsiveness when updating historical prices on slower computers.
- Fix: Preserve the source field when changing the account or portfolio in transaction dialogs.
- Fix: Fixed a stock split rounding error with reverse splits.
- Fix: Fixed the Quote Range column not being exported correctly in CSV export.
